race.comment: VINNY NAY (7) is on debut today for the Neville Parnham stable with Brad Parnham in the saddle. He's been in the saddle for both trials and remains with the son of I Am Invincible for his debut. Draws ideally and he can make an immediate impact. FAST BREAK (2) was good on debut in the Perth Stakes where he held his own. The slight rise in trip looks ideal and he's sure to be better for the fresh run. Wouldn't surprise to see him in the finish. STREET MONARCH (9) had things unfold a little fast for her on debut in the Gimcrack, but she'll be much better for that effort. Watson remains in the saddle and she closed off nicely there when she put it all together. Expecting an improved performance this time. CONSIGNMENT (1) finished around FAST BREAK in the Perth Stakes and he's now second-up and can improve. SUPER FATALE (8) draws well again today and was good in the Gimcrack off a break. Not out of this.
